Off Calendar Jul-02-2024 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Michele Avramov For An Order Compelling Defendant Orkin Llc To Provide Further Responses To Requests For Production
Off Calendar Mar-15-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICHELE AVRAMOV Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff Michele Avramov For An Order Compelling Defendant Orkin Llc To Provide Further Responses To Requests For Production

Granted. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at schwartz@cmslaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Andy Schwartz; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Defendant Orkin Llc To Provide Further Responses To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-15-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICHELE AVRAMOV'S Motion For An Order Compelling Defendant Orkin Llc To Provide Further Responses To Form Interrogatories.

There is no timely opposition filed. The motion is granted.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at schwartz@cmslaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Andy Schwartz; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
